contentBlocks.original:
करारविंदेन पदारविन्दं मुखारविंदे विनिवेशयंतम् ।
वटस्य पत्रस्य पुटेशयानं बालं मुकुंदं मनसा स्मरामि ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
karāraviṃdena padāravindaṃ mukhāraviṃde viniveśayaṃtam .
vaṭasya patrasya puṭeśayānaṃ bālaṃ mukuṃdaṃ manasā smarāmi ..
contentBlocks.translation: With the lotus-like hand, placing the lotus-like toes, in the lotus-like mouth, reclining on the banyan leaf - that young Mukunda, I meditate upon
contentBlocks.meanings: करारविंदेन (karāravindena) – with the lotus-like hand (kara:hand | aravindena:with the lotus-like); पदारविन्दं (padāravindaṃ) – lotus-like toes (pada:toes | aravindaṃ:lotus-like); मुखारविंदे (mukhāravinde) – in the lotus-like mouth (mukha:mouth | aravinde:in the lotus-like); विनिवेशयंतम् (viniveśayaṃtam) – placing; वटस्य (vaṭasya) – of the banyan; पत्रस्य (patrasya) – of the leaf; पुटे (puṭe) – in the hollow; शयानं (śayānaṃ) – reclining; बालं (bālaṃ) – young; मुकुंदं (mukuṃdaṃ) – Mukunda; मनसा (manasā) – with the mind; स्मरामि (smarāmi) – I meditate upon;
